    @allure.feature("Sign In")
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("data", login_test_data, ids=[d["test_case_id"] for d in login_test_data])
    def test_login(driver, data):
    
        email = data["email"] or ""
        password = data["password"] or ""
        expected_result = data["expected_result"]
    
        with allure.step(f"Open Tichi app and attempt login with email='{email}'"):
            login_page = LoginPage(driver)
            login_page.load()
            login_page.login(email, password)
    
        if expected_result == "success":
            with allure.step("Verify login succeeded"):
                assert login_page.is_login_successful(), (
                    f"Expected successful login for {email}, but home/dashboard was not detected."
                )
        else:
            with allure.step("Verify login failed with an error message"):
                error = login_page.get_error_message()
                login_succeeded = login_page.is_login_successful()
                assert not login_succeeded, f"Login unexpectedly succeeded for invalid data: {data}"
